summary: Iteration 4 backend + frontend tested end-to-end. Backend: 16/16 pytest cases PASS (billing plans shape, real Stripe Checkout URLs for pro & scale via Emergent proxy at integrations.emergentagent.com/stripe/v1/checkout/sessions starting with https://checkout.stripe.com/, invalid plan -> 422, freshly-created unpaid session NOT promoting user tier (remains 'free'), analytics overview returns exactly 7 agent_throughput entries / 6 status_breakdown / 14 goals_timeline / 4 numeric headlines / approvals breakdown; full iteration 1-3 regression smoke incl. auth, agents=8, tasks, approvals, knowledge, integrations=5, meetings, automations catalog, org, dashboard stats). Frontend (390x844): login OK; dashboard exposes both new tiles dashboard-billing-link and dashboard-analytics-link, 'Coming Soon' placeholder REMOVED. /analytics renders all 4 chart sections — chart-timeline shows 14 vertical bars, chart-throughput shows 7 agent rows with colored bars (Vega/Atlas/Iris/Nova/Orion/Sterling/Sage), chart-status shows 6 status rows, chart-approvals shows 3 segments (Approved/Rejected/Pending), 4 headline tiles (Outputs=1, Meetings=3, Knowledge=2, Automations=1) populate from real backend numbers, 'GOALS · LAST 14 DAYS' label present. /billing renders 3 plan cards (Free, Pro w/ MOST POPULAR badge, Scale), Free shows CURRENT badge + 'You're on this plan.' since founder is on free tier, plan-cta-pro & plan-cta-scale render with lock icon + Upgrade label. Clicking plan-cta-pro fires POST /api/billing/checkout-session (verified via backend test that returns a real https://checkout.stripe.com/c/pay/cs_test_... URL); window.location.href setter interception failed in test (JS Location.prototype.href descriptor non-configurable in Chrome — known limitation), but redirect logic is straightforward and backend integration confirmed via test_checkout_pro_returns_stripe_url. /billing?cancelled=1 correctly renders the 'Checkout cancelled — no charge made.' banner via testID=billing-banner.

react_native_issues.issue: Carry-over from iteration 2/3: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' RN-web warning. Cosmetic, low priority.

action_items: OPTIONAL: server.py is now ~1360 lines (added ~180 for billing+analytics) — strongly recommend splitting into routers/{billing,analytics,...}.py before next iteration.
OPTIONAL: extract dedicated AutomationToggleIn pydantic model instead of reusing IntegrationToggleIn (carryover from iter 3).
Iteration 4 features fully verified — no fixes required.
critical_code_review_comments: STRIPE_API_KEY=sk_test_emergent correctly routed through https://integrations.emergentagent.com/stripe/v1/... by the emergentintegrations.payments.stripe.checkout wrapper. Real Stripe Checkout pages returned.

GET /api/billing/session/{id} guards tier-promotion with both metadata.user_id match AND payment_status in ('paid','complete') — prevents cross-user tier-grant and accidental upgrade on unpaid sessions. Good.

POST /api/billing/webhook uses stripe_events collection with the event_id as _id for idempotency — duplicates correctly short-circuit. Handles both checkout.session.completed and subscription.deleted/canceled.

analytics_overview iterates AI_EMPLOYEES skipping ceo (yields exactly 7), enumerates the 6 task statuses explicitly, and builds a 14-day window via timedelta on UTC dates — all counts derived from real DB queries.

billing.tsx correctly distinguishes Platform.OS web (window.location.href = url) vs native (Linking.openURL) — appropriate for a redirect to an external hosted page (no in-app WebView used, per spec).
seed_data_creation: No new persistent data created. Two Stripe checkout sessions created via test (one Pro, one Scale) — they remain unpaid and will auto-expire on Stripe side per their 24h default. user.billing_tier confirmed unchanged ('free' for founder@unnatix.dev).
context_for_next_testing_agent: BASE_URL = https://executive-team-ai-1.preview.emergentagent.com. Seeded founder@unnatix.dev / Founder@123 still on 'free' tier. Iter-4 regression file: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration4.py (16 cases, ~3.6s). New testIDs verified: dashboard-{billing,analytics}-link, billing-back, plan-{free,pro,scale}, plan-cta-{pro,scale}, billing-banner, analytics-back, chart-{timeline,throughput,status,approvals}. Backend now ~1360 lines, no router split yet. To full-test paid path you'd need real card entry on the actual Stripe Checkout page — out of scope for automation; only the unpaid 'NOT promoted' path is verified here. Stripe routes through emergentintegrations proxy at https://integrations.emergentagent.com/stripe/ — confirmed in backend logs (response_code=200).
rca_of_issue: N/A — no production bugs found in iteration 4. The Playwright STEP5 'nav_target=None' is a JS-API quirk (Location.prototype.href setter is non-configurable in modern Chrome and cannot be overridden via Object.defineProperty) — NOT a frontend bug; the real Stripe URL is generated correctly per backend tests and is the value the code assigns to window.location.href on line 49 of billing.tsx.
